# LearnedLate

> AI readiness, workflow automation, and delivery support for New Zealand and Australian mid-market businesses.

## About

LearnedLate helps NZ and Australian businesses identify the right first AI workflow, automate it, and expand with the same delivery partner when the work becomes more complex.

**Our Difference:** We keep the offer simple: start with readiness, automate one real workflow, and expand with the same team if the work proves valuable.

## Core Services

### AI Readiness Assessment
Practical evaluation across people, process, technology, and data so you can choose the right first AI use case and the next step worth funding.

- Scored assessment across 4 dimensions
- Prioritized use-case shortlist
- Key risks and next-step recommendations
- Written summary within 48 hours

### AI Workflow Automation
Automate one high-friction workflow, connect it to your existing systems, and pilot it in real operations.

- Workflow mapping and pain point identification
- Integration with existing systems
- Pilot, measurement, and rollout planning

### Custom AI Development
Specialist path for cases where standard tools are not enough. We recommend custom AI only when the integration, logic, or differentiation genuinely requires it.

- Domain-specific logic
- Hard integration problems
- Narrow scoped delivery
- Used only when justified

### Delivery Partnership
For larger or more complex AI programs, LearnedLate stays involved from planning through rollout so context is not lost between strategy and delivery.

- Planning and sequencing across teams and systems
- One accountable delivery partner
- Operational follow-through after rollout

## Who We Help

- **Growing Teams (<50):** Focused AI workflow sprints, fast results, fixed price, NZ co-funding eligible
- **Mid-Market (50–500):** Full assessment, strategy, and phased implementation—our primary focus
- **Enterprise (500+):** Transformation programs with governance frameworks and multi-year roadmaps

## Key Stats

- 87% of NZ businesses use AI, but only 12% have scaled it effectively
- 95% enterprise pilot failure rate (MIT NANDA 2025)
- +47% ROI for early movers, -14% to -43% for late adopters
- NZ AI Advisory Pilot: 50% co-funding available (up to $15K)

- [Blog](https://learnedlate.com/blog/): Insights on AI adoption in ANZ

## Contact

- **Book an AI Readiness Assessment:** https://learnedlate.com/contact/
- **Email:** hello@learnedlate.com
- **Location:** New Zealand & Australia
- **Twitter:** https://x.com/learnedlate

## Key Principles

1. **Outcome-first:** Lead every engagement with business results, not technical capability
2. **C-suite readable:** Every headline should be understood without technical background
3. **Specificity:** Use numbers, timeframes, and dollar amounts—not vague claims
4. **Honesty:** "If the answer is 'you don't need AI right now,' we'll tell you that too."
5. **Plain-language delivery:** Keep the offer clear, practical, and easy to buy
